name: codex-safeguard
description: Codex-native safeguard that blocks destructive Bash and PowerShell commands before execution.

interface.shortDescription: Block destructive Bash and PowerShell commands before Codex runs them.
interface.longDescription: Packages hook templates, install guidance, diagnostics, and explanation workflows for a Codex-native command safeguard inspired by claude-code-safety-net.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Safeguard to install destructive-command protection in this repo.
Use Codex Safeguard to explain why a command was blocked.
